title: Setting Up and Connecting to the Company VPN
text:
Q: How do I set up and connect to the company VPN?
A: The company uses GlobalProtect (or L2TP/IPsec) VPN. Follow the steps for your operating system.

Windows: Step 1: Open Settings > Network & Internet > VPN. Step 2: Click 'Add a VPN connection'. Step 3: Set VPN provider to 'Windows (built-in)'. Step 4: Enter 'Company VPN' as the Connection name. Step 5: Enter the VPN server address (provided by IT) in 'Server name or address'. Step 6: Set VPN type to 'L2TP/IPsec with pre-shared key' and enter the shared secret from IT. Step 7: Enter your company username and password. Step 8: Click Save, select the VPN connection, and click Connect.

macOS: Step 1: Open System Settings (macOS 13+) or System Preferences > Network. Step 2: Click '+' to add a new connection; set Interface to 'VPN' and VPN Type to 'L2TP over IPsec'. Step 3: Enter 'Company VPN' as the Service Name. Step 4: Enter the VPN server address and your company username. Step 5: Click 'Authentication Settings', enter your password and shared secret from IT, then click OK. Step 6: Click Apply, then Connect.

If using GlobalProtect: Download the GlobalProtect installer from the IT portal, run it, enter the gateway address provided by IT, and log in with your SSO credentials. GlobalProtect reconnects automatically when switching networks.

Troubleshooting: Verify your internet connection is active, confirm your credentials are correct, and ensure no firewall is blocking the VPN port. Contact IT Helpdesk if the issue persists.
